flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Occidental College rose 16% between 2007 and 2010 ($35.4k → $40.9k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Occidental College fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (79.4% → 67.8%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Occidental College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($58.4k → $66.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Occidental College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.2% → 0.0%).
